# MediKloud - AI Grounding Documentation (llms.txt)

> MediKloud is India’s first tech-driven healthcare partner building infrastructure, technology, and operations for small hospitals and clinics across India. We specialize as a managed hospital pharmacy operator, helping independent hospitals optimize pharmacy operations, eliminate revenue leakage, and improve patient care through our zero-capex managed model.

## Core Services
- **Managed Pharmacy Operations**: Specialized end-to-end pharmacy management for hospitals including licensed staffing and inventory.
- **Free HMS (Hospital Management System)**: A comprehensive, tech-enabled hospital management solution provided at no cost to partner hospitals.
- **Automated Medicine Deliveries from Hospital Pharmacies**: Efficient and tech-driven medicine fulfillment for chronic care and home refills, dispatched directly from hospital-based pharmacies.
- **Virtual Pharmacy Solutions**: Remote pharmacy management and digital integration for clinics.

## Technical & Operational Excellence
- **Zero Stockouts**: Real-time inventory tracking and dynamic mapping of fast-moving prescriptions.
- **Zero Capex**: Deployment of infrastructure and inventory without capital expenditure from the hospital.
- **Rapid Deployment**: Full operational readiness in less than 14 days.
- **Revenue Protection**: Stopping leakage from "lost prescriptions" by keeping fulfillment in-house.

## Target Audience & Geo
- **Focus**: Independent Hospitals (10-100 beds) and Multi-specialty Clinics.
- **Location**: Primary operations in India (HQ: Hyderabad, Telangana).

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://www.medikloud.com
- **Phone**: +91-7702670993
- **Email**: sales@medikloud.com
